description: Improve audit workbook: include all fields from SheetSummary.as_audit_row() and StatusEntry.as_audit_row() (including TM hits, dedup hits, and the translation text) in the Translation_Status_Log and Translation_Summary sheets written by write_translation_audit_sheets().
steps: In src/stx/excel/exporter.py write_translation_audit_sheets(), update summary_columns to include ALL keys returned by SheetSummary.as_audit_row(): ['Sheet Name', 'Total Rows', 'Translated Rows', 'Skipped Rows', 'TM Hits', 'Dedup Hits']

Update status_columns to include ALL keys returned by StatusEntry.as_audit_row(): ['Sheet Name', 'Row Index', 'Key', 'Label', 'Translation', 'Status'] -- note that 'Translation' was previously missing from the columns list
Verify that SheetSummary.as_audit_row() in runner.py already returns TM Hits and Dedup Hits (it does)
Verify that StatusEntry.as_audit_row() in runner.py already returns Translation (it does)
The fix is simply that write_translation_audit_sheets hardcoded a subset of columns that did not include 'TM Hits', 'Dedup Hits', or 'Translation'
acceptance_criteria: write_translation_audit_sheets creates Translation_Summary with columns: Sheet Name, Total Rows, Translated Rows, Skipped Rows, TM Hits, Dedup Hits
write_translation_audit_sheets creates Translation_Status_Log with columns: Sheet Name, Row Index, Key, Label, Translation, Status
findings: Fix applied cleanly. All 68 tests pass. Used pyenv 3.11.15 with pip install -e '.[gui,dev]' for environment setup.
